summary: DRHP Export Module - All 16 tests passed. Word (.docx) and PDF export functionality working correctly with SEBI formatting preservation.
passed_tests: 4. test_word_export_returns_valid_file - Word export returns valid .docx file (37KB)
5. test_word_export_preserves_headings - Headings (h1-h6) preserved in Word export
6. test_word_export_preserves_tables - Tables preserved in Word export (1 table found)
7. test_word_export_preserves_bold_italic - Bold and italic formatting preserved
8. test_pdf_export_returns_valid_file - PDF export returns valid PDF file (15KB)
9. test_pdf_export_includes_sebi_styles - PDF includes SEBI CSS styles
10. test_export_uses_company_name_in_filename - Filename includes company name and board type
11. test_export_falls_back_to_saved_content - Falls back to saved content if none provided
12. test_export_no_content_returns_400 - Returns 400 when no content available
13. test_export_sme_board_type - SME board type export works correctly
14. test_export_mainboard_type - Mainboard type export works correctly

docx_export.description: Export to Word (.docx) using python-docx with SEBI styles
docx_export.details: DRHPWordExporter class converts HTML to Word with proper formatting

pdf_export.description: Export to PDF using WeasyPrint with print-optimized CSS
pdf_export.details: DRHPPDFExporter class generates PDF with SEBI-specific styles

filename_generation.description: Filename includes company name and board type (SME/MAINBOARD)

content_fallback.description: Falls back to saved content if none provided in request

critical_code_review_comments: DRHPWordExporter class properly handles HTML to Word conversion with BeautifulSoup parsing
DRHPPDFExporter uses WeasyPrint with comprehensive SEBI-specific CSS styles
Export endpoint correctly handles both formats with proper Content-Type and Content-Disposition headers
Fallback to saved content works correctly when no content provided in request
test_credentials: Test users and projects created dynamically and cleaned up after each test
seed_data_creation: Test projects created with company name 'Test Export Company Ltd' for filename verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: DRHP export module fully tested. DRHPWordExporter and DRHPPDFExporter classes working correctly. Export endpoint POST /api/projects/{project_id}/drhp-output/export accepts format (docx/pdf), board_type (sme/mainboard), and content (HTML string). Returns StreamingResponse with proper headers. All 16 tests passing.
